nodes.label: Capital Efficiency Through SpaceX T Trading
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 103020_冰冰小美_有时候想想，昨日切一部仓位去商业航天。然后昨日大涨的卖出，空出仓位顺势而为去做T。资金效率已经放大到极致。Space x.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Rotating capital into commercial space and conducting T trades after gains is presented as a way to maximize capital efficiency when consensus overcomes quantitative selling pressure.

nodes.label: K-Shaped Economy and Market Dispersion
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 103329_冰冰小美_五月统计数据，继续K型经济。消费下行负增长，高端制造业投资增速15%。反应市场，75%跌25%涨。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Negative consumption growth and 15% high-end manufacturing investment growth are used to characterize a K-shaped economy and a market where most stocks decline while a minority rise.

nodes.label: Drivers of Weak Consumption
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 105215_冰冰小美_这种消费增速，是什么原因导致的？科技与狠活食品添加剂问题，预制菜，动不动就曝光的食品安全问题，比如泡面梅菜，比如水果侵染.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Food-safety concerns, debt effects on income and employment, property-bubble aftermath, demographic decline, ageing, higher saving, and the end of subsidies are presented as causes of consumption weakness.

nodes.label: Causes of Losses in a Rising Market
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 110340_冰冰小美_这行情还能亏钱的。第一种大概率就是追涨杀跌+单一重仓导致的。第二种就是持有老登没有控制仓位，甚至补仓，经济数据都不支持补.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Chasing rallies, concentrating in legacy stocks without position control, and copying trades without a full framework are presented as sources of losses.

nodes.label: Position Sizing and Investor Psychology
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 112131_冰冰小美_如果被套的怎么办。1，股票波动在所难免。被套第一件事，审问内心，睡眠如何。如果睡眠下降，则是仓位与心态不匹配。你买之前就.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Sleep disruption is treated as evidence that a position exceeds psychological and financial capacity; balanced allocation, avoiding casual averaging down, and avoiding leverage are presented as safeguards.

nodes.label: Disciplined Position Reduction and T Trading
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 120256_冰冰小美_按我的持仓配置，很大程度与ETF持仓配置差不多。超过20%都是超级重仓。同一个方向买入40%也是超级重仓。这一点当初科普.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Positions above 20%, or 40% in one direction, are characterized as concentrated; halving positions after gains and conducting T trades in profitable long-term holdings are presented as disciplined risk management.

nodes.label: Policy Support for Real Technology
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 144955_冰冰小美_陆家嘴论坛。核心，村长高质量发展新质生产力，投融资支持不变。但是打击伪科技。外汇对冲工具。买好股，做好人。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: The LuJiazui Forum is summarized as supporting financing for high-quality new productive forces while cracking down on pseudo-technology; foreign exchange is described as a hedging tool.

nodes.label: Potential Sources of Incremental Equity Capital
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 151937_冰冰小美_到底是什么力量推动了这一轮的上涨。1，gjd？汇金等已经退出一部分资金。2，私募基金？私募基金在整改。3，公募基金？公募.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Insurance liquidity, foreign capital, a shift from bonds, leverage, and returning hedging capital are considered possible contributors to market strength, while the ultimate source remains uncertain.

nodes.label: Hard Technology Cycle Through 2028
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 155013_冰冰小美_菜就多练。4-8到现在，如果你没买过一次科技股（非垃圾科技而是硬核科技），说明你一点都不关心国家发展。从4-8到现在，我.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Hard technology is distinguished from speculative technology; possible bubbles are framed as requiring a time horizon, and the technology market is asserted to have persistence before 2028.

nodes.label: G2 Technology Competition and Productivity
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 155958_冰冰小美_G2竞争必然，科技拉近差距，产业规模同步增长，争夺全球市场，那么估值也会拉近。不然美国市场不就崩溃了。美国崩溃有什么好处.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: China-US competition is framed as driving technology, industrial scale, and converging valuations; productivity growth and production-relation change are presented as preferable to disorder.

nodes.label: Participating in the Technology Era
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 164015_冰冰小美_错过时代比选择正确更可怕。老登会是价值投资，未来一定能挣。新登也许是投机，但是时代的机会，错过的后悔，可能是一辈子。因此.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: The article prioritizes investment in enterprises representing national strength and participation in a long technology-era opportunity over conventional value-investing caution.

nodes.label: Historical Cycle of Capital, War, and Competition
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 171113_冰冰小美_资本市场有100年魔咒，比如荷兰，西班牙，法国，英国，美国主导的都是100年就衰退。衰退的直接原因都是战争。越是强大的资.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A proposed historical cycle links dominant capitalist powers, war, and decline; technological competition and restraint are presented as preferable to conflict.

nodes.label: Low-Volatility Portfolio Through Risk Reduction
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 173930_冰冰小美_中国人向来以成败论英雄。我那个小小的组合，今日都创下新高。这还是我漫不经心的调仓与选择。如果连我组合都跑不赢的，又有什么.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A portfolio reaching a new high with low drawdown is attributed to reducing positions at risk points; position management is identified as a lifelong investment skill.

nodes.label: June 17 Investment Narrative Synthesis
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 182748_冰冰小美_@今天就到这10分，我用Claude帮我解读了一下小美今天发言，大家可以看看617 核心观点深度解读一、先理解她当天.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A reposted Claude-generated interpretation presents the June 17 posts as a chain from macro conditions through trading, risk management, worldview, history, and portfolio results.

nodes.label: Active ETF Transparency and Fund Manager Selection
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 203321_冰冰小美_全部历史新高。基金买卖的实力都强的可怕。怎么选择到的。其实是问Ai。为什么突然晒支付宝基金？其实今天看到一个信息，要推出.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: The prospective active ETF is framed as making holdings transparent and increasing the importance of fund-manager evaluation; AI is described as helping select funds.

nodes.label: Learning From Active Fund Rebalancing
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 210949_冰冰小美_主动基金观察，主要是看调仓，调仓肯定有择时，也有仓位变化。比如，唐老鸭调仓后，今天储存芯片大涨，看原来持仓，应该5%，但.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Observing active funds focuses on rebalancing, timing, and position changes; a small storage-chip allocation alongside a new high and controlled drawdown is attributed to research depth.

nodes.label: Left-Side Staged Position Building
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 213822_冰冰小美_有人问，我什么时候右侧加仓。我建仓通常是左侧，核心是底线思维，思考极端风险，以及未来三年的变化。因此，建仓通常是阶梯式建.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Positions are built gradually on the left side using downside thinking and a multi-year view; right-side additions are avoided unless strict conditions across valuation, liquidity, macro data, and market behavior are met.

nodes.label: Screening Pseudo-Technology Claims
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 220242_冰冰小美_今日收盘，有一大堆个股发布澄清公告。因为要打击伪科技。这是提示与撇清关系。所以，审核自己的好企业好股票，是不是这种情况。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Clarification announcements amid action against pseudo-technology are presented as a signal to distinguish speculative short-term names from genuine companies.

nodes.label: Future Seven Sisters
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-18 214812_冰冰小美_未来七姐妹， 谷歌 ， 苹果 ，Space x， 英伟达 ， 英特尔 ，Anthropic， 博通 。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Google, Apple, SpaceX, Nvidia, Intel, Anthropic, and Broadcom are explicitly grouped under the named concept Future Seven Sisters.

nodes.label: Industry Credit and Supply-Demand Resonance
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-21 092036_冰冰小美_虽说如此，但是基本没有平白无故的选择。过程的艰辛，时间的漫长，心态的波动，都是有的。一路凯歌，从始至终，是很难做到的，我.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Multiple holdings are linked to the resonance of industrial credit expansion, supply-demand cycles, and key technology-route positions; the approach emphasizes lengthy observation and correction over perfection.

nodes.label: Industry Upgrade Versus High-Price Speculation
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-21 093344_冰冰小美_如今20倍的 铜冠铜箔 ，现在来研究买不买，如何买。这已经是高层次的博弈。高位博弈，不排除杠杆资金驱动。因此，高风险高回.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A twentyfold rise in Tongguan Copper Foil is framed as high-risk, potentially leverage-driven speculation, while the upgrade from ordinary to high-speed foil is framed as a longer-term industry-research opportunity.

nodes.label: Reallocation From Legacy Holdings to Technology
nodes.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-22 100006_冰冰小美_如果仓位重没有救， 比亚迪 108卖，你没看， 柳工 因石油冲击，出海逻辑变化认输割肉，你没看。这种危机，都通过减仓调仓.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Selling or cutting positions when a holding thesis changes, then reallocating toward technology, is presented as a response to crises and K-shaped market divergence.

edges.source_file: D:\Temp\create_skills\bingbingxiaomei-perspective\references\sources\articles\2026-06-17 120256_冰冰小美_按我的持仓配置，很大程度与ETF持仓配置差不多。超过20%都是超级重仓。同一个方向买入40%也是超级重仓。这一点当初科普.md

hyperedges.label: June 17 Technology Investment Narrative
